testcase.name: Full stats flow - login to display
testcase.system-out:
🚀 Starting Data Tool E2E Tests
✓ Secrets loaded from environment variables ✓ All secrets validated. App URL: https://fitness-ai-app.ashycliff-d78872a9.canadacentral.azurecontainerapps.io
📋 Test: Full stats flow - login to display Logging in test user: statstest@example.com After login - Current URL: https://fitness-ai-app.ashycliff-d78872a9.canadacentral.azurecontainerapps.io/ ✓ Test user logged in successfully
📊 Resetting user data... Resetting test user data (clearing workouts)... Workout delete endpoint not found, attempting alternative cleanup... No workouts found to delete (page is already clean)
📊 Creating test data... Creating 5 dummy workouts for test user... - Creating: Push-ups ✓ Workout created successfully - Creating: Running ✓ Workout created successfully - Creating: Squats ✓ Workout created successfully - Creating: Bench Press ✓ Workout created successfully - Creating: Pull-ups ✓ Workout created successfully ✓ Dummy workouts creation completed
📊 Navigating to /stats page...
📊 Verifying stats display... ✓ Stats content visible on page ✓ No error messages on page
✅ Test passed: Stats flow working end-to-end
Logging out test user... ✓ Test user logged out
testcase.system-err: Warning: Could not verify login status. Continuing anyway...

testcase.name: Data flow chain verification - frontend to data-tool
testcase.system-out:
📋 Test: Data flow chain verification
Logging in test user: statstest@example.com After login - Current URL: https://fitness-ai-app.ashycliff-d78872a9.canadacentral.azurecontainerapps.io/ ✓ Test user logged in successfully Resetting test user data (clearing workouts)... Workout delete endpoint not found, attempting alternative cleanup... No workouts found to delete (page is already clean) Creating 3 dummy workouts for test user... - Creating: Push-ups ✓ Workout created successfully - Creating: Running ✓ Workout created successfully - Creating: Squats ✓ Workout created successfully ✓ Dummy workouts creation completed
🔗 Tracing data flow chain... 1. Frontend → Server: 500 Logging out test user... ✓ Test user logged out
🏁 All E2E tests completed

testcase.name: Error handling - capture 500 errors for diagnosis
testcase.system-out:
🚀 Starting Data Tool E2E Tests
✓ Secrets loaded from environment variables ✓ All secrets validated. App URL: https://fitness-ai-app.ashycliff-d78872a9.canadacentral.azurecontainerapps.io
📋 Test: Error handling - capture 500 errors
Logging in test user: statstest@example.com After login - Current URL: https://fitness-ai-app.ashycliff-d78872a9.canadacentral.azurecontainerapps.io/ ✓ Test user logged in successfully Resetting test user data (clearing workouts)... Workout delete endpoint not found, attempting alternative cleanup... No workouts found to delete (page is already clean) Creating 2 dummy workouts for test user... - Creating: Push-ups ✓ Workout created successfully - Creating: Running ✓ Workout created successfully ✓ Dummy workouts creation completed
🔍 Attempting to fetch stats and capture any errors...
📊 API Response: Status: 500 Headers: { "content-type": "application/json", "date": "Wed, 22 Apr 2026 08:00:12 GMT", "vary": "rsc, next-router-state-tree, next-router-prefetch, next-router-segment-prefetch" }
Logging out test user... ✓ Test user logged out
🏁 All E2E tests completed

testcase.name: Network error recovery
testcase.system-out:
🚀 Starting Data Tool E2E Tests
✓ Secrets loaded from environment variables ✓ All secrets validated. App URL: https://fitness-ai-app.ashycliff-d78872a9.canadacentral.azurecontainerapps.io
📋 Test: Network error recovery
Logging in test user: statstest@example.com After login - Current URL: https://fitness-ai-app.ashycliff-d78872a9.canadacentral.azurecontainerapps.io/ ✓ Test user logged in successfully Resetting test user data (clearing workouts)... Workout delete endpoint not found, attempting alternative cleanup... No workouts found to delete (page is already clean) Creating 1 dummy workouts for test user... - Creating: Push-ups ✓ Workout created successfully ✓ Dummy workouts creation completed
🌐 Normal load successful Testing page handles data load gracefully... ✓ Page renders even with potential network issues
Logging out test user... ✓ Test user logged out
🏁 All E2E tests completed
testcase.system-err: Warning: Could not verify login status. Continuing anyway...
